title: Balanced brackets
prompt: Write is_balanced(s) returning True if every bracket in s — (), [], {} — closes in the right order. This is the classic first payoff of a stack: push each opener, and each closer must match the most recent open one (pop and compare). Non-bracket characters are ignored.

details.restate: Look at the brackets in the text — (), [], {}. Answer True if every opener gets closed by the matching closer in the right order, and no bracket is left open or closed too early.

io.because: every bracket closes in exactly the reverse order it opened
a square closer can't close a round opener
one round bracket never gets closed
